testcase.name: test_get_influencer_profile_with_token

testcase.name: test_update_influencer_profile

testcase.name: test_get_influencers_list

failure.message: assert False + where False = isinstance({'influencers': [{'bio': 'Tech reviewer et entrepreneur', 'category': 'Tech', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T21:52:54.332166+00:00', 'engagement_rate': 3.9, ...}, {'bio': 'Photographe de voyage et aventurier', 'category': 'Travel', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T21:52:54.554738+00:00', 'engagement_rate': 4.5, ...}, {'bio': 'Chef et critique culinaire suisse', 'category': 'Food', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T21:52:54.095615+00:00', 'engagement_rate': 4.8, ...}, {'bio': "Blogueuse lifestyle et déco d'intérieur", 'category': 'Lifestyle', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T21:52:54.666363+00:00', 'engagement_rate': 5.8, ...}, {'bio': 'Maquilleuse professionnelle et consultante beauté', 'category': 'Beauty', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T21:52:54.207031+00:00', 'engagement_rate': 6.1, ...}, {'bio': 'Sommelier et critique gastronomique', 'category': 'Food', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T21:52:54.781265+00:00', 'engagement_rate': 6.4, ...}, ...], 'total': 8}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_influencer_refactoring.py:159: in test_get_influencers_list assert isinstance(data, list) E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'influencers': [{'bio': 'Tech reviewer et entrepreneur', 'category': 'Tech', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T21:52:54.332166+00:00', 'engagement_rate': 3.9, ...}, {'bio': 'Photographe de voyage et aventurier', 'category': 'Travel', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T21:52:54.554738+00:00', 'engagement_rate': 4.5, ...}, {'bio': 'Chef et critique culinaire suisse', 'category': 'Food', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T21:52:54.095615+00:00', 'engagement_rate': 4.8, ...}, {'bio': "Blogueuse lifestyle et déco d'intérieur", 'category': 'Lifestyle', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T21:52:54.666363+00:00', 'engagement_rate': 5.8, ...}, {'bio': 'Maquilleuse professionnelle et consultante beauté', 'category': 'Beauty', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T21:52:54.207031+00:00', 'engagement_rate': 6.1, ...}, {'bio': 'Sommelier et critique gastronomique', 'category': 'Food', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T21:52:54.781265+00:00', 'engagement_rate': 6.4, ...}, ...], 'total': 8}, list)

failure.message: assert False + where False = isinstance({'influencers': [{'bio': "Blogueuse lifestyle et déco d'intérieur", 'category': 'Lifestyle', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T21:52:54.666363+00:00', 'engagement_rate': 5.8, ...}, {'bio': 'Passionnée de mode et de lifestyle à Lausanne', 'category': 'Lifestyle', 'created_at': '2026-01-22T21:52:53.948533+00:00', 'engagement_rate': 5.2, ...}], 'total': 2}, list)
